speakers.name: Oncology  Trodelvy
speakers.title: Expect FDA decisions for Trodelvy in 1L mTNBC patients who are not candidates for PD-1 inhibitors and for Trodelvy plus pembrolizumab in 1L PD-L1 positive mTNBC in 2H26

speakers.name: L mTNBC.
speakers.title: Expect 2H26 update from Phase 3 ASCENT-GYN-01 evaluating Trodelvy in 2L metastatic endometrial cancer (new milestone)

speakers.name: Yeztugo.
speakers.title: Q425 QoQ primarily due to seasonal inventory dynamics, higher average realized price from favorable channel mix, and higher demand
speakers.firm: higher average realized price from favorable channel mix

speakers.name: Veklury.
speakers.title: FY25 YoY driven by demand-led HIV sales growth, partially offset by $1

speakers.name: Lenacapavir Pipeline
speakers.title: Expect 1H26 update from Phase 3 ISLEND-1 & 2 evaluating a once-weekly islatravir plus lenacapavir for virally suppressed people with HIV

speakers.name: PWH.
speakers.title: Aligned with guidance shared at the HIV analyst event last year, development of GS-3242 has been prioritized, and a Phase 1 update for GS-3242 is expected at CROI 2026
speakers.firm: development of GS-3242 has been prioritized

speakers.name: Inflammation  Liver Disease
speakers.title: Presented late-breaking, real-world data showing that Livdelzi is an effective and well-tolerated alternative for PBC patients switching from obeticholic acid at AASLD 2025
speakers.firm: real-world data showing that Livdelzi is an effective and well-tolerated alternative for PBC patients switching from obeticholic acid at AASLD 2025
